title: Eval Set Provenance v1
description: Provenance metadata for frozen evaluation set v2 (M30). Documents origin, selection logic, and reproducibility guarantees for synthetic frozen eval data.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of provenance artifact creation

generatorVersion.description: Version of the frozen eval generator used (e.g., 'v2.0.0')

selectionSeed.description: Random seed used for deterministic selection (fixed for reproducibility)

positionSources.description: List of sources for chess positions (e.g., 'algorithmic_fen_seeds_v1')

skillBucketStrategy.description: Strategy used for skill bucket assignment (e.g., 'uniform_synthetic')

timeControlStrategy.description: Strategy used for time control assignment (e.g., 'random_uniform')

timePressureStrategy.description: Strategy used for time pressure assignment (e.g., 'random_uniform')

auditNotes.description: Explicit audit statement about the synthetic nature of this eval set. Required for governance clarity.

determinismHash.description: SHA-256 hash of canonical provenance content
